mapper.select: SELECT sfg.student_id AS studentId, g.name AS className, s.identity_id AS identityId, s.name AS studentName, sfg.final_score AS finalScore, sfg.bank_id AS bankId, sfg.record_id AS recordId, sfg.update_time AS addDatetime FROM student_final_grade sfg JOIN student s ON sfg.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN "group" g ON s.class_id = g.id WHERE sfg.bank_id = #{param.bankId} ORDER BY sfg.final_score DESC, s.id ASC

SELECT sec.teaching_question AS teachingQuestionId, tq.type AS questionType, tq.content AS questionContent, sec.content AS studentAnswer, tq.answer AS correctAnswer, sec.score AS studentScore, qbl.score AS maxScore, tq.choice_question_options AS choiceQuestionOptions FROM student_exercises_content sec JOIN teaching_question tq ON sec.teaching_question = tq.id LEFT JOIN questions_banks_list qbl ON sec.teaching_question = qbl.question_id AND sec.teaching_question_bank_id = qbl.bank_id WHERE sec.record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY qbl.sequence ASC, qbl.id ASC

SELECT tq.id AS questionId, tq.content AS questionContent, tq.answer AS correctAnswer, tq.answer_analysis AS answerAnalysis, qbl.score AS maxScore, sec.id AS contentId, sec.record_id AS recordId, s.name AS studentName, sec.content AS studentAnswer FROM student_exercises_content sec JOIN student_exercises_record ser ON sec.record_id = ser.id JOIN teaching_question tq ON sec.teaching_question = tq.id JOIN teaching_question_bank tqb ON ser.teaching_question_bank_id = tqb.id JOIN textbook tb ON tqb.textbook_id = tb.id LEFT JOIN questions_banks_list qbl ON tq.id = qbl.question_id AND tqb.id = qbl.bank_id LEFT JOIN student s ON ser.student_id = s.id WHERE ser.teaching_question_bank_id = #{param.bankId} AND ser.status = 1 AND tq.type = 5 AND sec.score IS NULL ORDER BY -- 必须先按题目ID排序，便于后续分组 tq.id ASC, s.id ASC
